description: CompositionMagenta round neck top made of a polyester and viscose blend fabric, has a frilly neckline with frilled short sleeves and a band of three roses of the same colour just below the neck on the left, coupled with an elasticated hemlineFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryDesigned for that casual feminine look, this frilly top from jealous 21 looks all the more stylish with the puffed sleeves and mock roses. Team this with jeans or skirts and ballerina flats or floaters for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
